summary: Tested Espace Gestion (club) registration/login flow end-to-end. Backend (5/5 pytest) and Frontend (4/4 UI E2E) both fully working. Homepage 'Espace Gestion' button (top-right) links to /fr/club-login. Both Connexion & Inscription tabs work. Registration + login via UI hit real /api/club/register and /api/club/login (both 200 OK), JWT token stored in localStorage as 'club_token' + 'club_dojo', and app redirects to /fr/club-dashboard.

integration_issues.issue: After successful club login, user is redirected to /fr/club-dashboard which returns 404 (page not implemented yet - 'Missing required html tags' error from Next.js). Not part of the current test scope but blocks post-auth UX.

issues: No data-testid attributes on tabs, inputs, or buttons - relied on ids (dojo-name, city, admin-email, admin-password, etc.) and role/name selectors. Adding data-testid would improve future test robustness.

action_items: (Optional / next task) Implement /fr/club-dashboard page - currently returns Next.js 404 after successful club login.
(Testability) Add data-testid attributes on club-login page: tabs (connexion-tab/inscription-tab), submit buttons (login-submit/register-submit), and key inputs.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 6235 lines - should be split into modular files (routers/clubs.py, routers/members.py, etc.) per code-review guidelines (>700 lines rule).
Club registration/login endpoints correctly use bcrypt, exclude _id from MongoDB responses, and issue JWT with 7-day expiry - clean implementation.
Frontend club-login page is functional but lacks data-testid attributes required by testing guidelines.
test_credentials: Created dynamic accounts uitest_<uuid>@wayofdojo.com / test123. Pre-existing per task note: admin-test@aikido-lyon.fr / club123.
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates a new club with random uuid suffix (both in MongoDB dojos + club_admins collections). Left in DB - safe (TEST_ pattern not applied since endpoint doesn't accept prefixed dojo names by task convention).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Club auth E2E fully validated. Endpoints POST /api/club/register and POST /api/club/login work. Frontend flow at /fr/club-login is complete (registration form fields have ids: dojo-name, city, address, dojo-email, phone, description, admin-firstname, admin-lastname, admin-email, admin-password, admin-password-confirm). Successful login writes club_token + club_dojo to localStorage and redirects to /fr/club-dashboard (which is a 404 - NOT YET IMPLEMENTED).
rca of the issue: N/A - No bugs found in the requested scope. All 4 test cases passed.
